steps.title: Identify the key evidence
steps.content: Archaeological evidence shows clam size and abundance both increased during the period when the terraced garden method was documented as being used. This measurable outcome demonstrates effectiveness.

steps.title: Match evidence to the conclusion
steps.content:
Choice A directly reflects the evidence: effectively maintained means the clams persisted, while promoted its robustness matches the increases in size and abundance.

The other three either add unsupported claims about adoption or comparisons, or discuss contemporary practice not addressed in the passage.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
